questionHtml: State two effects hypertension can have on the circulatory system.
markschemeHtml:
stroke ✔

thrombosis ✔

blood clot ✔

heart attack ✔

heart failure ✔

aortic aneurysms ✔

coronary heart disease/CHD ✔

peripheral arterial disease ✔

atherosclerosis ✔

 

Award up to [2 max] for the first two answers given
